calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Direct Entry Of Renewal Of Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Oct-11-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ANDREA INFANTE, 415.956.8400, ASSISTANT TO COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF ROLANDO GUERRA; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF ROLANDO GUERRA's Motion To Direct Entry Of Renewal Of Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc IS GrantED. No opposition filed.
